contentBlocks.original:
उत्तिष्ठोत्तिष्ठ गोविन्द उत्तिष्ठ गरुडध्वज
उत्तिष्ठ कमलाकान्त त्रैलोक्यं मङ्गलं कुरु
contentBlocks.transliteration:
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha govinda uttiṣṭha garuḍadhvaja
uttiṣṭha kamalākānta trailokyaṃ maṅgalaṃ kuru
contentBlocks.translation: Arise, arise, O Govinda! Arise, O one who bears the Garuda emblem! Arise, O beloved of Lakshmi! Bring auspiciousness to the three worlds.
contentBlocks.meanings: उत्तिष्ठ (uttiṣṭha) – arise; उत्तिष्ठ (uttiṣṭha) – arise; गोविन्द (govinda) – Govinda; उत्तिष्ठ (uttiṣṭha) – arise; गरुडध्वज (garuḍadhvaja) – one who bears Garuda emblem (garuḍa:Garuda | dhvaja:emblem); उत्तिष्ठ (uttiṣṭha) – arise; कमलाकान्त (kamalākānta) – beloved of Lakshmi (kamalā:Lakshmi | kānta:beloved); त्रैलोक्यं (trailokyaṃ) – three worlds (tri:three | lokyaṃ:worlds); मङ्गलं (maṅgalaṃ) – auspiciousness; कुरु (kuru) – bring;
